languages.text: {n}Что-то в странном порождении ксеносской магии — структура, цвет, пульсация — заставляет вас вздрогнуть. Вы узнаете признаки портала, некогда перенесшего вас в зацикленную реальность экспозиции — ловушку, выбраться из которой удалось лишь чудом.{/n}

{n}Something about this strange creation of xenosorcery — the structure, the colour, the way it seems to pulse — makes your skin crawl. You recognise the features of the portal that once transported you into the looped reality of the exhibit, a trap that you escaped only by a sheer miracle.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Что-то в странном порождении ксеносской магии — структура, цвет, пульсация — заставляет вас вздрогнуть. Вы узнаете признаки портала, некогда перенесшего вас в зацикленную реальность экспозиции — ловушку, выбраться из которой удалось лишь чудом.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Something about this strange creation of xenosorcery — the structure, the colour, the way it seems to pulse — makes your skin crawl. You recognise the features of the portal that once transported you into the looped reality of the exhibit, a trap that you escaped only by a sheer miracle.{/n}

{n}Something about this strange creation of xenosorcery — the structure, the colour, the way it seems to pulse — makes your skin crawl. You recognise the features of the portal that once transported you into the looped reality of the exhibit, a trap that you escaped only by a sheer miracle.{/n}

{n}Something about this strange creation of xenosorcery — the structure, the colour, the way it seems to pulse — makes your skin crawl. You recognise the features of the portal that once transported you into the looped reality of the exhibit, a trap that you escaped only by a sheer miracle.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Algo en esta extraña creación de la xenohechicería, ya sea su estructura, su color o la forma en la que parece palpitar, te pone los pelos de punta. Reconoces las características del portal que te transportó una vez a la realidad en bucle de la exposición, una trampa de la que solo escapaste por puro milagro.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Something about this strange creation of xenosorcery — the structure, the colour, the way it seems to pulse — makes your skin crawl. You recognise the features of the portal that once transported you into the looped reality of the exhibit, a trap that you escaped only by a sheer miracle.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Algo en esta extraña creación de la xenohechicería, ya sea su estructura, su color o la forma en la que parece palpitar, te pone los pelos de punta. Reconoces las características del portal que te transportó una vez a la realidad en bucle de la exposición, una trampa de la que solo escapaste por puro milagro.{/n}

languages.text: {n}那异形巫师的诡异造物，它的结构、颜色，还有那种脉动的感觉，让你毛骨悚然。你认出了这道传送门，就是它把你送进了展品的循环时空。当时你全靠天降奇运才逃出那个陷阱。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Something about this strange creation of xenosorcery — the structure, the colour, the way it seems to pulse — makes your skin crawl. You recognise the features of the portal that once transported you into the looped reality of the exhibit, a trap that you escaped only by a sheer miracle.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}那异形巫师的诡异造物，它的结构、颜色，还有那种脉动的感觉，让你毛骨悚然。你认出了这道传送门，就是它把你送进了展品的循环时空。当时你全靠天降奇运才逃出那个陷阱。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Il y a quelque chose dans cette étrange création de xénosorcellerie qui vous donne la chair de poule, qu'il s'agisse de sa structure, de sa couleur ou des pulsations qui semblent l'animer. Vous reconnaissez le portail qui vous a précédemment {mf|transporté|transportée} dans la boucle temporelle de l'exposition, un piège dont vous avez réussi à vous échapper par miracle.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Something about this strange creation of xenosorcery — the structure, the colour, the way it seems to pulse — makes your skin crawl. You recognise the features of the portal that once transported you into the looped reality of the exhibit, a trap that you escaped only by a sheer miracle.{/n}

Vous reconnaissez le portail qui vous a précédemment {mf|transporté|transportée} dans la boucle temporelle de l'exposition, un piège dont vous avez réussi à vous échapper par miracle.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Zeno sahirliğinin meydana getirdiği bu tuhaf yaratıma dair bir şeyler... Yapısı, rengi, nabız gibi atışı... Tüylerini ürpertiyor. Seni daha önce serginin döngüsel gerçekliğine, yalnızca tam bir mucize eseri kaçabildiğin o tuzağa taşıyan geçidin özelliklerini iyi biliyorsun.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Something about this strange creation of xenosorcery — the structure, the colour, the way it seems to pulse — makes your skin crawl. You recognise the features of the portal that once transported you into the looped reality of the exhibit, a trap that you escaped only by a sheer miracle.{/n}

Seni daha önce serginin döngüsel gerçekliğine, yalnızca tam bir mucize eseri kaçabildiğin o tuzağa taşıyan geçidin özelliklerini iyi biliyorsun.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Irgendetwas an dieser seltsamen Xenohexerei — die Struktur, die Farbe, die Art, wie sie zu pulsieren scheint — verursacht bei dir Gänsehaut. Du erkennst das Portal, das dich einst in die Realität der Ausstellung transportiert hat, eine Falle, der du nur durch ein schieres Wunder entkommen bist.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Something about this strange creation of xenosorcery — the structure, the colour, the way it seems to pulse — makes your skin crawl. You recognise the features of the portal that once transported you into the looped reality of the exhibit, a trap that you escaped only by a sheer miracle.{/n}

Du erkennst das Portal, das dich einst in die Realität der Ausstellung transportiert hat, eine Falle, der du nur durch ein schieres Wunder entkommen bist.{/n}

languages.text: {n}この異界の魔術による奇妙な創造物について、その構造、色、脈打つように見える様子など、何かがあなたの肌をぞっとさせます。あなたは、かつてあなたがループした現実の展示に運んだポータルを認識します。あなたは奇跡的な幸運でその罠から脱出したのです。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Something about this strange creation of xenosorcery — the structure, the colour, the way it seems to pulse — makes your skin crawl. You recognise the features of the portal that once transported you into the looped reality of the exhibit, a trap that you escaped only by a sheer miracle.{/n}
